case_title: DARRYL C. LEUNG VS. TREVOR THOMAS ET AL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C. AS TRUSTEE, OR ANY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE, OF THE DARRYL C LEUNG REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED JULY 26, 2007 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, TREVOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE; $21,010.00 RENT, $337.50 COSTS, $4,481.08 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $2,116.43 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,712.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
